components.title: AWS Identity and Access Management
components.description: IAM CDEF using AWS Security Hub control identifiers (realistic upstream).

control-implementations.description: Real upstream uses SecHub IDs, not NIST IDs.

implemented-requirements.description: IAM users' access keys should be rotated every 90 days or less
Password policies for IAM users should have strong configurations
Hypothetical unmapped control (should not get enrichment fields)
